premium.testPhase: This feature is currently in a test phase and available to premium users only.

landing.heroDescription: Kitchen inventory, recipe ideas, grocery trips, dining expenses, and subscriptions — all in one place. HomeBud helps your household save time, money, and food.
landing.featuresSubtitle: From what's in your fridge to where your money goes — HomeBud keeps it all organized.
landing.featureKitchenDesc: Track every item with expiry dates, categories, and nutrition info.
landing.featureScanDesc: Scan barcodes to add products instantly, or snap a receipt to log expenses.
landing.featureAIDesc: Get recipe suggestions based on what's in your fridge — reduce waste, eat better.
landing.featureGroceryDesc: Log every shopping trip with items, prices, and discounts.
landing.featureEatingOutDesc: Record restaurant visits, scan bills, and track how much you spend eating out.
landing.featureSubscriptionsDesc: Keep tabs on recurring costs like meal kits, streaming, and delivery services.
landing.featureSpendingDesc: See where your money goes with charts broken down by category and month.
landing.featureRecipesDesc: Save recipes, discover new ones, and see which ingredients you already have.
landing.step1Desc: Create your free account in seconds. No credit card needed.
landing.step2Desc: Scan barcodes, snap receipts, or add items manually to build your kitchen inventory.
landing.step3Desc: AI-powered recipes, spending breakdowns, and expiry alerts — all automatic.
landing.ctaDescription: Join HomeBud today and simplify your household. Kitchen, budget, and meals — all in one app.

tos.title: Terms of Service
tos.subtitle: Please review and accept our terms to continue.
tos.section1Body: We store your email and name. Your kitchen inventory, recipes, and spending data are stored securely on our servers and are only accessible to you and your household members.
tos.section2Body: Your data is used solely to provide the Kitchen Helper service. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties. Anonymized, aggregated usage statistics may be collected to improve the service.
tos.section3Body: We use OpenAI for AI-powered features (recipe suggestions, receipt scanning) and Open Food Facts for product lookups. Data sent to these services is limited to what is necessary for the feature to function.
tos.section4Body: You may request deletion of your account and all associated data at any time by contacting us. Upon deletion, all your personal data will be permanently removed from our servers.
tos.section5Body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
tos.accept: I Accept the Terms of Service
